name: get_property
full_help:
get_property

Description: 
Get properties of object

Syntax: 
get_property  [-min] [-max] [-quiet] [-verbose] <name> <object>

Returns: 
property value

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-min]      Return only the minimum value
  [-max]      Return only the maximum value
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of property whose value is to be retrieved
  <object>    Object to query for properties

Categories: 
Object, PropertyAndParameter, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
